name: create-stratix
description: Create Stratix apps with zero configuration

scripts.copy-templates: mkdir -p dist/generators/entity/templates dist/generators/value-object/templates dist/generators/use-case/templates dist/generators/repository/templates dist/generators/test/templates dist/generators/context/templates && cp src/generators/entity/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/entity/templates/ && cp src/generators/value-object/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/value-object/templates/ && cp src/generators/use-case/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/use-case/templates/ && cp src/generators/repository/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/repository/templates/ && cp src/generators/test/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/test/templates/ && cp src/generators/context/templates/*.ejs dist/generators/context/templates/

author: P. Andrés Carvajal <causticrez@gmail.com>
